arts.ttl: Guardiola makes four changes for City’s final visit to Goodison Park
arts.sum: Stefan Ortega Moreno, Matheus Nunes, Savinho and Bernardo Silva come into the Starting XI in place of Ederson, Rico Lewis, Mateo Kovacic and James McAtee for the 15:00 (UK) kick-off against Everton. Amidst the emotion of a last trip to this 133-year-old grand old grand, there’s no question that this match carries serious significance this season, with the Blues aiming for three points to continue our push for Champions League football.

arts.ttl: Man City ready to spend €200m on Kevin De Bruyne replacement
arts.sum: Man City are ready to have a busy summer transfer window on the back of a poor season, and midfield is one area that will be addressed. arts.ttl: Everton vs Manchester City – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to Goodison Park for the final time this afternoon to face Everton. Pep Guardiola’s side are on course to qualify for the Champions League and currently sit just inside the top five. The Spanish manager’s options have been reinforced by the timely returns of Manuel Akanji and Phil Foden.
